description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named unity build plugins that builds Unity plugins for various platforms. The workflow should trigger on workflow dispatch and on push to specific paths. It should have multiple jobs for different platforms (android, android_qjs, ios, ios_qjs, osx, osx_node, osx_qjs, windows, windows_qjs, windows_node, linux64) with steps to check out code, download backend artifacts, install required tools, build plugins, and upload artifacts.
